mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, nickname, avatar, cover_url) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{coverUrl})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET followers_count = followers_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET followers_count = GREATEST(followers_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET following_count = following_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET following_count = GREATEST(following_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
